access_token.description: GoCardless access token, sent as Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Never logged.

base_url.description: GoCardless API base URL. Use https://api.gocardless.com for live or https://api-sandbox.gocardless.com for sandbox. Legacy derives this from a gocardless_environment config value (live/sandbox), but that cross-key derivation has no engine mechanism today (see docs.md Known limits), so this bundle requires the fully-formed URL instead.

gocardless_version.description: GoCardless-Version header value sent on every request.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects created at or after this time are read on a full sync. Sent as the created_at[gt] query filter.
